name: sessions
description: Search and sync AI coding sessions (Claude, Codex, Gemini). Local mode uses SQLite at ~/.hasna/sessions/sessions.db; cloud mode (HASNA_SESSIONS_STORAGE_MODE=cloud) is PURE REMOTE per Amendment A1 — sessions-serve reads/writes the shared cloud Postgres directly (schema + session metadata only; large message/tool blobs live in SQLite locally and go to S3 later).
